reference: What does it mean when your ribs feel like they are being held up? I have been feeling like this for a couple of weeks now. Sometimes I cannot crouch, and my back hurts from just sitting up straight for too long. I just want to know what this means and if it is bad for me to feel this way.
text: What does it mean when your dreams feel like better than you come out? What does it feel like it's a couple of weeks ago? Sometimes I'm on a couch, and my bathroom is sitting up to a kitchen desk. I just want to know what the change is, and if it is bad for me to feel this way.
